description: You are a BIM Content Developer at 'ArcticFlow', an HVAC equipment manufacturer. Author a new standalone IFC4 product model for the 'AF-500 Commercial Chiller' from scratch using BlenderBIM/Bonsai, incorporating the metadata and port requirements from the specification brief on the Desktop. The model must include physical geometry, classification as an MEP chiller (IfcChiller or IfcEnergyConversionDevice), the manufacturer property set, and at least two nested logical MEP connection ports (IfcDistributionPort). Save the final model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/arcticflow_chiller.ifc.
